docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $397.66 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT CRIZALDO PATRIA F AKA TANTILLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRIZALDO PATRIA F AKA TANTILLAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRIZALDO PATRIA F AKA TANTILLAS $397.66 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $449.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $10.78 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CRIZALDO PATRIA F AKA TANTILLAS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CRIZALDO PATRIA F AKA TANTILLAS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CRIZALDO PATRIA F AKA TANTILLAS
